name: Frans Raspberry Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake batter according to the cake mix directions, using half a can of 7up and four eggs.
2. Combine the raspberry pie filling with half a can of 7up and pour into the Dutch oven.
3. Carefully spread the cake batter over the raspberries without mixing.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 30 minutes, placing eight coals on top of the Dutch oven and sixteen coals on the bottom.
5. Check the cobbler's doneness with a toothpick after 20 minutes.
6. Serve the cobbler with whipped topping or vanilla ice cream.
